title: Wynn's Legacy - Wynncraft
description:
Wynn’s Legacy (Unofficial) 
Enhance your experience on the official Wynncraft server:

🛠️ Useful Tools: Better UI and maps.

🚀 Performance: No lag, no bugs, pure smoothness.

Community-made. Not affiliated with official staff.
body:
Unofficial Modpack for the Official Wynncraft Server
This pack is a collection of unofficial community tools designed to enhance your gameplay on the official server:

✅ Useful Features: Enhanced maps, quest trackers, and UI improvements.

🚀 Performance: Optimization mods to fix lag and reduce bugs for a smoother experience.

Note: This modpack is a community project and is not affiliated with or supported by the official Wynncraft staff.
